properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jesus Beautiful Saviour God of all majesty Risen King Lamb of God Holy and righteous Blessed Redeemer Bright morning star

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: All the heaven shout Your praise All creation bows to worship You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: How wonderful How beautiful Name above every name Exalted high How wonderful How beautiful Jesus Your name Name above every name Jesus Jesus

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Jesus, beautiful Saviour God of all majesty, risen King

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: How wonderful, how beautiful Name above every name, exalted high How wonderful, oh, how beautiful Jesus, Your name Name above every name, Jesus

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I will sing forever Jesus I love You Jesus I love You
